title: 以下、スタックしている？ › 完遂せよ。マルチエージェントがマストの/kernel で進めて • Kernel orchestration is active for this session. Bootstrap target: requirements packet -> simulation gate -> hands-off execution. Active models: gpt-5, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3- codex, GLM general-reviewer, Copilot Lane manifest: - Main lane: 統合と実装 - 残る...
summary_text: Lane C 監査結果です。`assistant-daemon` の実行経路と、`QUEUE_API_KEY` 入手後の最短検証経路を確定しました（編集なし）。 **実行経路** 1. LaunchAgent: [com.cloudflare-workers-hub.assistant-daemon.plist](/Users/masayuki/Library/LaunchAgents/com.cloudflare-workers-hub.assistant-daemon.plist) 2. ProgramArguments: `/bin/bash` -> [assistant-daemon-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/assistant-daemon-runner.sh) -> `~/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env` 3. 実行本体: [assistant-daemon.cjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/assistant-daemon.cjs) 4. 現在の実プロセス: `/Users/masayuki/.local/node-arm64/bin/node .../assistant-daemon.cjs`（arm64） 5. `assistant-daemon.env` は `ASSISTANT_API_KEY`/`ADMIN_API_KEY` は入っているが `QUEUE_API_KEY` 行は未定義 **queue auth 検証のコマンド経路** 1. 事前に key 単体で検証（反映前） ```bash set -a source /Users/masayuki/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env set +a FOUND_QUEUE_KEY='<<found_key>>' curl -sS -o /tmp/queue.json -w '%{http_code}\n' \ -H "X-API-Key: ${FOUND_QUEUE_KEY}" \ "${WORKERS_URL}/api/queue" curl -sS -o /tmp/queue-heartbeat.json -w '%{http_code}\n' \ -X POST -H "X-API-Key: ${FOUND_QUEUE_KEY}" \ "${WORKERS_URL}/api/queue/heartbeat" ``` 2. 反映後の包括検証（公式 ready check） ```bash bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/check-assistant-daemon-ready.sh \ /Users/masayuki/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env ``` **最小 restart + verify シーケンス** 1. `QUEUE_API_KEY` を [assistant-daemon.env](/Users/masayuki/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env) に設定 2. 再起動 ```bash launchctl kickstart -k gui/$(id -u)/com.cloudflare-workers-hub.assistant-daemon ``` 3. 稼働確認 ```bash launchctl print gui/$(id -u)/com.cloudflare-workers-hub.assistant-daemon | sed -n '1,80p' ``` 4. API 検証 ```bash bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/scripts/check-assistant-daemon-ready.sh \ /Users/masayuki/.config/cloudflare-workers-hub/assistant-daemon.env ``` 5. ログ最終確認 ```bash tail -40 /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/logs/assistant-daemon-launchd.log tail -40 /Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/logs/assistant-daemon/daemon.log ``` 補足: key 供給系として `queue-key-sync` も存在し、LaunchAgent は [com.cloudflare-workers-hub.queue-key-sync.plist](/Users/masayuki/Library/LaunchAgents/com.cloudflare-workers-hub.queue-key-sync.plist)、スクリプトは [sync-queue-api-keys.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub/scripts/sync-queue-api-keys.sh) です。
